system.description: A creature with this trait can move through solid objects by burrowing through them. This trait always includes a number to indicate speed. Such creatures can burrow through soil, rock, sand, and so on, though some (expressed in the creature's entry) can burrow through metal. When a creature burrows, it leaves behind a tunnel. Creatures of one size smaller than the creature that created the tunnel can enter these areas without impediment. There is a 50% chance each round that the tunnel collapses behind the creature.
